name: Change of Control
description: One party is undergoing a change of control event (merger, acquisition, or sale of substantially all assets). Simulate the contractual consequences including consent requirements, assignment restrictions, termination rights, and survival of obligations.

parameters.name: change_type
parameters.description: Type of change of control event

parameters.name: affected_party
parameters.description: Which party is undergoing the change of control

parameters.name: acquirer_is_competitor
parameters.description: Is the acquirer a competitor of the other party?

parameters.name: notice_given
parameters.description: Has advance notice of the change been given to the other party?

analysis_guidance: Focus on: (1) Assignment/anti-assignment clauses — does the contract restrict assignment? Is there a carve-out for mergers, acquisitions, or changes of control? Does it require prior written consent? (2) Change of control definitions — does the contract specifically define 'change of control'? Does this event fall within that definition? (3) Consent requirements — is the other party's consent required? What happens if consent is not obtained? (4) Termination rights — does a change of control give the non-affected party a right to terminate? Under what conditions? (5) Notice obligations — must the affected party notify the other party? When? In what form? (6) Confidentiality risks — does confidential information flow to the acquirer? Are there restrictions? Is the acquirer a competitor? (7) IP rights — how do IP licenses and assignments transfer (or not) upon change of control? (8) Non-compete/non-solicit — do any restrictive covenants interact with the change of control? (9) Survival — which obligations survive the change of control event?
